label: Household Stability Calculator
description: Aggregates calendar, feast, year-length, storehouse, and routine data into a simple stability score and narrative for the household.
notes: This node acts as a summarizing calculator for household stability, using calendar and planning inputs (year length, feasts, offerings, storehouse readiness, and meal balance) to generate a stability score, narrative, and suggested next actions. It is designed to feed into higher-level planning flows (household plan, curriculum, seasonal focus) and to be re-used by the SessionRunner when suggesting stabilizing sessions (cleaning, cooking, garden, and preservation).
